ui_key_110: How do I log a planted tree?
ui_key_111: Click the "Plant for Abhiyan" Floating Action Button on the map or campaign hub. Ensure GPS is on, and upload a photo.
ui_key_112: Why isn't the app fetching my location?
ui_key_113: Ensure your phone's GPS is turned on and you have granted the app Location permissions in your phone settings.
ui_key_115: To ensure the survival of trees, we ask users to upload a second photo of their tree 6 months after planting.
ui_key_116: How do I get on the Green Guardians Leaderboard?
ui_key_117: Plant more trees! The leaderboard tracks the top contributors globally.
ui_key_119:
We use a highly precise, scientific algorithm based on data from the USDA and the European Environment Agency (EEA). Because carbon sequestration is a biological process, we do not use a flat average. Instead, we use a continuous, non-linear growth curve that calculates your tree's CO2 absorption down to the exact fraction of a day since it was planted.

The algorithm maps to 3 biological stages:
1. Seedling (Year 1): Baseline absorption up to 2 kg/year.
2. Sapling (Years 2-5): Rapid canopy expansion scaling up to 5 kg/year.
3. Mature Tree (Year 5+): Peak carbon drawdown unlocking the full capacity of 21 kg/year.

This ensures your CO2 metrics are a live, scientifically grounded reflection of your real-world environmental impact.
ui_key_123: This app collects your precise GPS location ONLY when you are actively submitting a tree plantation form. This is to accurately pin your tree on the Global Tree Map. We do NOT track your location in the background.
ui_key_125: We require camera or gallery access to verify tree plantations and track 6-month growth updates. We only access the specific photo you consciously choose and upload. We do NOT scan your entire photo library.
ui_key_127: We collect your name and email address via Firebase for security. Your name and "Total Trees Planted" score will be publicly visible to other users on the Green Guardians Leaderboard.
ui_key_129: We utilize Google Firebase for database hosting and secure authentication, and OpenStreetMap (OSM) for converting GPS coordinates into readable addresses.
ui_key_131: You have the right to request the complete deletion of your account, your GPS coordinates, and your tree photos from our servers at any time by contacting our support team.

ui_key_140: The Green Vasundhara Abhiyan is a community-driven initiative to restore our urban canopy. Join us in fighting climate change, one tree at a time.
ui_key_143: Every tree absorbs CO2 and purifies our air.

ui_key_152: Seed balls are an ancient and incredibly effective method of reforestation in hard-to-reach areas. Encased in a mixture of clay and compost, seeds remain protected from predators until the monsoon rains trigger their germination. Join us this season in throwing thousands of seed balls to revive our barren hills!
